title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Tata CLiQ Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Tata CLiQ Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata CLiQ Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata CLiQ Capital India:
Tata CLiQ Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
